_meta.description: NaCCA Ghana Curriculum Database – KG1 to JHS3 (B9). Machine-ready for LessonGen Ghana AI.
_meta.source: Official NaCCA PDFs, Ministry of Education, Republic of Ghana (September 2019 / 2020 editions)
_meta.primary_lesson_format: DAYS | PHASE 1 STARTER (10 min) | PHASE 2 MAIN (40 min) | PHASE 3 REFLECTION (10 min)
_meta.jhs_lesson_format: Phase / Duration | Learner Activities | Resources | Assessment

pedagogy_rules.B1–B3: Guided discovery, activity-based, TLMs | 60 min | 5 days/week
pedagogy_rules.B4–B6: Learner-centred, group work, problem-solving | 60 min | 5 days/week
pedagogy_rules.B7–B9: Analytical, critical thinking, project-based | 60 min | 5 days/week

KG1._pedagogy: Play-based, song and rhyme-driven, movement activities, integrated thematic approach; 3 days (Mon/Wed/Fri)
